raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-K-002] interface.f90:5 <-> header.h:2  param[1] 'n'
  VALUE_MISMATCH: Fortran 'n' has VALUE attribute (pass by value, int in RDI).
  C prototype passes 'int *n' (pointer to int, 8 bytes in RSI).
  Fortran reads 8 bytes (pointer address) as a 4-byte integer. Garbage value.

WARNING [TC-K-002] header.h:2
  UNDERSCORE_NAME: Symbol 'solver_' has trailing underscore. This may be
  an old-style Fortran mangled name. Verify this is an intentional
  BIND(C, name="solver_") interface and not a legacy non-BIND interface.
